title: Understand: evolution and common ancestry
description: Check your understanding of evolution and common ancestry in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about evolution is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Evolution involves a change in inherited traits.
Evolution occurs in individual organisms.
Evolution can occur within a single generation.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about evolution is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Evolution occurs in populations of organisms.
Evolution involves a change in non-inherited traits.
Evolution occurs within a single generation.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about evolution is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Evolution occurs over multiple generations.
Evolution involves a change in non-inherited traits.
Evolution occurs in individual organisms.

assessment_items.question_content:
The following image shows a black bear in Canada.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Which of these best describes the evolutionary lineage of modern-day black bears?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

options.alt: A large black bear walking in a field.

choices.content: the black bear’s series of ancestral species, stretching back through time
all of the modern species that are related to the black bear

assessment_items.question_content:
The following image shows a tiger.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Which of these best describes the evolutionary lineage of modern-day tigers?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

options.explanation: "[Panthera tigris altaica in Lodz Zoo 1](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Panthera_tigris_altaica_in_Lodz_Zoo_1.jpg)" by Chrumps, [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/deed.en)

choices.content: the tiger’s series of ancestral species, stretching back through time
all of the modern species that are related to the tiger

assessment_items.question_content:
The following image shows a bald eagle.

[[☃ image 1]]

**Which of these best describes the evolutionary lineage of modern-day bald eagles?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

options.explanation:
"[Bald Eagle (Haliaeetus leucocephalus)
](https://www.flickr.com/photos/33017468@N07/5275774830)" by Steve Berardi, [CC BY-SA 2.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/deed.en)

options.alt: A bald eagle flying in the air.

choices.content: the bald eagle’s series of ancestral species, stretching back through time
all of the modern species that are related to the bald eagle

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these best describes an evolutionary common ancestor?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: an ancestral species that is shared by multiple modern-day species
a modern-day species that has many related species living today

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these best describes a common ancestor of two modern-day species: Species 1 and Species 2?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: an ancestral species that is shared by both Species 1 and Species 2
a modern-day species that is related to both Species 1 and Species 2

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>An evolutionary common ancestor is \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: an ancestral species that is shared by multiple modern-day species
a modern-day species that has many related species living today

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

>Species that share a common ancestor in the more recent past are \_\_\_\_\_\_ closely related.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: more
less

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

>Species that share a common ancestor in the more distant past are \_\_\_\_\_\_ closely related.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: less
more

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

>Species that share a common ancestor in the more \_\_\_\_\_\_ past are more closely related.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: recent
distant
